compiled_state.title: As a developer, I can run /dso:architect-foundation to scaffold enforcement infrastructure starting from the project understanding artifact
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Rename dev-onboarding to /dso:architect-foundation, revise to read .claude/project-understanding.md as starting context, use Socratic dialogue for additional understanding, and remove duplication with /dso:onboarding
**Why**: The heavy scaffolding work (enforcement layers, anti-pattern analysis, architectural tests, pre-commit config, .test-index) should start from full project understanding rather than re-detecting and re-asking
**Scope**:
- IN: Rename skill directory from dev-onboarding to architect-foundation; revise SKILL.md to read project-understanding.md first; replace rigid wizard with Socratic dialogue for any gaps; remove detection/config sections that duplicate /dso:onboarding; use grounded detection (CoVe) for any additional filesystem checks; CI workflow awareness
- OUT: Creating project-understanding.md (S3); detection script changes (S1); redirect stubs for old name (S8)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, /dso:architect-foundation reads .claude/project-understanding.md and skips all detection and questions already answered in that artifact
  ← Satisfies: "/dso:architect-foundation reads .claude/project-understanding.md as starting context"
- When this story is complete, the skill uses Socratic dialogue for any additional understanding it needs beyond what the artifact provides (e.g., enforcement preferences, anti-pattern risk tolerance)
  ← Satisfies: "uses Socratic dialogue for any additional understanding it needs"
- When this story is complete, no questions or detection steps duplicate what /dso:onboarding already covers
  ← Satisfies: "produces no duplicate questions or detection when run after onboarding"
- When this story is complete, detection within the skill is grounded in filesystem verification (same CoVe pattern as /dso:onboarding)
  ← Satisfies: "Detection is grounded in filesystem verification"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Socratic dialogue pattern shared with /dso:onboarding (S2) — reuse the checklist structure
- [Scope] This skill does NOT regenerate dso-config.conf — if enforcement-related config keys are needed, it appends to the existing file

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All implementation tasks closed. Story complete: /dso:architect-foundation skill created, reads project-understanding.md, Socratic dialogue for enforcement.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
